title: Change theme to black and red

requirements.text: Update the color scheme throughout the application from the current dark gaming aesthetic to a black and red theme. Modify CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css to use black as the primary background color and red as the accent color. Update all color variables including background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, and destructive colors to align with the black and red palette.

quotes: change the theme to black and red

acceptanceCriteria: All backgrounds use black or near-black colors
Primary accent colors use red tones
Text maintains sufficient contrast against black backgrounds
The black and red theme is consistently applied across all screens (passkey, device name, popup)
Interactive elements (buttons, inputs, borders) use the red accent color appropriately

constraints: Maintain existing functionality and screen flow
Keep the skull logo and gaming aesthetic intact
nonGoals: Altering the passkey validation or sensitivity calculation
